title: Aleph (disambiguation)
content:
'''Aleph''' was a letter of the [[Common Sith]] alphabet. It was also a letter of the [[Myke (language)|Myke]] alphabet.

As a name, '''"Aleph"''' could refer to several things:

*'''[[Aleph-class starfighter|''Aleph''-class starfighter]]''', a [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Bunker Aleph-One]]''', a base on [[Storinal]] from which [[Wraith Squadron]] managed to steal two [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|Tie/ln starfighters]]s, destroying two more in the process.
*'''[[Bunker Twenty-Two Aleph]]''', a location where the shuttles of the starship [[Hawkbat (starship)|''Hawkbat'']] resupplied.
*'''[[Task Force Aleph]]''', an element of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]].

{{Disambig}}
